title: Jump²
description: Allows the player to double jump, similar to old arcade style video games!
body:
please do not upload this to any other site without Addie's permission ------------- [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jump2) [](https://modrinth.com/project/jumpsquared) [](https://fabricmc.net/) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png) -------------

Small Q&A!

### What does this add / do? - This mod allows you too double jump and boost jump, increasing the jump height to 5+ blocks. (Both of the bars will consume hunger over time, you will also take damage from both so be cautious when using them!) ### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge? - Nope. I just don't have the time to maintain multiple mod versions. You can look at the `DEV TALK` page [here](https://addi3.github.io/) for a detailed answer. ### How do i get access to betas? - You can access betas via my [Ko-fi page](https://ko-fi.com/addi3dabaddie)! ### Can you add… / How do you use…? - You can suggest stuff on the github issues page. I will also try answer any questions! The mod also has a [wiki](https://addi3.github.io/jumpsquared_wiki) so make sure to check there too. ------------- -------------

Credits

### Developers: - [Addi3_Astarr](https://addi3.github.io/) (Lead Developer) -------------
